competitive_position: Zycus is the confirmed front-runner (Martin, 2026-06-15: 'you're a front runner'; ~99.8% RFP score). The strongest CURRENT threat is not a named rival but the SteerCo fairness re-score of thin-scope, lower-cost vendors plus 'do nothing/delay' against a tight close — both neutralised by locking a formal award. The lower-cost vendors are dismissed as functionally inadequate (~3 modules) and one failed to submit an implementation cost. GEP and Coupa are named in CRM as the field but were not actively pressed in recent calls; the buyer praised Zycus's Merlin Intake UI as the best they have seen.

champion.summary: Martin Loveday is a strong, multi-threaded champion who authored the RFP, runs cadence, and is the access path to both budget (Anna-Marie) and the EB (Gavin); supported by senior sponsor Anna-Marie Ferguson and decision-maker Gavin Greer.

items.area: Baseline procurement cycle-time metrics for a Global-Switch-specific ROI case
items.quote: step one is what are our cycle times... we don't have anything in place.

items.area: Direct commercial closure with Anna-Marie Ferguson on the final number (relayed via Martin, not yet confirmed by her directly)
items.quote: Well, I think Anna's gonna maybe come back on that specifically if that needs to happen.

recommended_moves: Co-author a one-page mutual close plan with Martin that names a dated formal award by ~6 Jul and sequences redline + signing back from a target signature date.
Pre-stage the MSA redline pack now and offer a direct Zycus-legal-to-Shoosmiths call to trigger the moment the award lands.
Deliver a short-licence hands-on walkthrough for finance, legal and non-procurement users.
next_step: What We Covered TodayMerlin Intake & Agentic Sourcing — end-to-end RFP creation via Microsoft Teams, AI-generated SOWs, price benchmarking and supplier recommendationsiContract — metadata extraction, clause library, Instareview, bulk amendment (in beta, targeted ~6 months), obligation tracking and SearchGenieSupplier Onboarding & iRisk — D&B/Moody's integrations, configurable onboarding questionnaires, supplier risk radarGuided Walkthrough SessionFollowing your feedback, we'd love to set up a focused, hands-on session where your broader team can experience the guided buying journey, approval flows and end-to-end process first-hand. We'd like to propose the following options, for a 1-hour timeslot.Monday 29 June, 4:00 – 5:00 PMTuesday 30 June, 11:00 AM – 1:00 PMRFP call check reviewed, no change - Final demo on the 22nd - decision 2 weeks after that - we are preferred vendor - confirmed on call - timelines for contracting is JulySubmitted RFP on the 3rd June - we will hear back- The responses should arrive no later than 3 weeks after receipt of the RFPPricing to be finialised 01/06RFP recieved deadline 4th of JuneRFP is a carbon copy of Zycus S2P Primer!Meeting with Anna-Marie (CTO) went well - Confirmed we demo'd the best, our platform meet their needs and wants a partnership,believe's - we can meet those objective

meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: Two economic/budget authorities are mapped and not contradicted by the calls. CRM MEDDPICC 2.0 (updated 2026-06-16) names Gavin Greer (Group Procurement Director) as economic buyer and Anna-Marie Ferguson (Director of Business Intelligence and Performance) as budget owner. The calls corroborate Ferguson holds the commercial mandate: Anthony, 2026-05-27, 'Anna-Marie's given me the indication of what your budget is, so we're gonna be getting to that mark', and Martin, 2026-06-15, deferred the commercial sign-off to her ('Anna's gonna maybe come back on that specifically'). Gavin actively controlled scope and pricing decisions on the 2026-05-27 sizing call. The one gap a closer flags: Zycus has NOT had direct commercial closure with Ferguson on the final number — Martin relays her position rather than her engaging Zycus directly. In a champion-authored tender the path to her runs through Martin, not around him.

buyer_decision_authority_SFDC.name: Anna-Marie Ferguson
buyer_decision_authority_SFDC.title: Director of Business Intelligence and Performance
